# DRIVXIS Football Analysis Platform

This project is DRIVXIS, a web platform for analyzing football matches. It uses computer vision models like YOLOv8 to extract statistics and data from football videos.

## Key Guidelines for AI Agents

- Focus on implementing accurate video analysis features for football matches
- Use Python for machine learning and computer vision tasks
- Prioritize performance and accuracy in object detection and tracking
- Follow standard Python coding practices (PEP8)
- Use English for code comments and documentation, despite the project name and README being in Spanish

## Architecture Notes

- Web platform for user interface
- Backend processing for video analysis
- Integration with YOLOv8 for object detection

## Potential Pitfalls

- Video processing can be computationally intensive; optimize for performance
- Ensure accurate detection of football-related objects (players, ball, etc.)
- Handle various video formats and qualities

For more details, see [README.md](../README.md)</content>
